---
title: "Perplexity — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Descriptive catalog of canonical parser v3 parquets"
source-title: "Perplexity"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "perplexity"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Perplexity"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#20808D"  # Perplexity teal
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Perplexity"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = []
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **About Perplexity:** parser v3 covering threads (copilot/concise) +
> pages (research, `conversation_id='page:<slug>'`) + spaces. Search results
> extracted from `blocks[*].web_result_block.web_results` become tool_events.
> `is_pinned` on threads, ENTRY_DELETED preserves orphans in spaces. Modes:
> copilot/concise/research.

{{< include _template.qmd >}}
